proxies.basis: Temporal pole strongly co-activates with amygdala in emotional/social processing (Olson 2007)
Anterior insula functionally coupled with amygdala in anxiety and salience network (Seeley 2007)
OFC-amygdala coupling in reward and threat learning

amygdala.limitations: Cortical surrogate only; TribeV2 does not predict amygdala BOLD directly.

proxies.basis: sgACC-ventral striatum in depression and reward (Mayberg 2005)

ventral_striatum.limitations: Cortical surrogate only; ventral striatum is subcortical and not in fsaverage5.

subgenual_ACC.limitations: Surface prediction available; some signal-dropout vulnerability in empirical fMRI but predicted normally by TribeV2.

vmPFC.limitations: Approximated by medial orbital sulcus label in Destrieux atlas.

anterior_insula.limitations: Short insular gyri approximate anterior insula; mid-insula included in G_Ins_lg_and_S_cent_ins.

temporal_pole.limitations: Temporal pole is on cortical surface and predicted directly.

hypothalamus.limitations: Subcortical structure; not predicted by TribeV2 on fsaverage5 surface.

periaqueductal_gray.limitations: Brainstem structure; not predicted by TribeV2 on fsaverage5 surface.

proxies.basis: Parahippocampal cortex is functionally and anatomically adjacent to hippocampus; encodes episodic context
Anterior collateral sulcus borders parahippocampal/entorhinal cortex

hippocampus.limitations: Hippocampus is subcortical; cortical proxies only approximate episodic/contextual memory function.
